name: agente-ariba-enterprise-ai
description: Plataforma Full Stack para Testes e Diagnóstico SAP Ariba

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run infra:up && npm run install:all
